title: oskampia scandens
intro: Oskampia scandens is a plant species native to New Caledonia, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions. Oskampia scandens can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
